creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Created attachment 144469
Patch to update the port to 2140706

=> foomatic-db-4.0-20140704.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /var/ports/distfiles/foomatic.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.openprinting.org/download/foomatic/foomatic-db-4.0-20140704.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.openprinting.org/download/foomatic/foomatic-db-4.0-20140704.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.wart.ru/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/foomatic/foomatic-db-4.0-20140704.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.wart.ru/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/foomatic/foomatic-db-4.0-20140704.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Attempting to fetch http://mirror.hanse.de/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/foomatic/foomatic-db-4.0-20140704.tar.gz
fetch: http://mirror.hanse.de/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/foomatic/foomatic-db-4.0-20140704.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/foomatic-db-4.0-20140704.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/foomatic-db-4.0-20140704.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /var/ports/distfiles/foomatic and try again.
